query: SELECT establishmentId, COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN hasStock = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_estoque FROM products WHERE establishmentId IN (30001, 60018, 90001, 150004) GROUP BY establishmentId;
